configurations.name: Java Properties (Output not escaped)
configurations.description: Java properties files (Characters in the output encoding are not escaped)
configurations.parametersRaw:
#v1
useLD.b=true
localizeOutside.b=true
useKeyCondition.b=false
extractOnlyMatchingKey.b=true
keyCondition=.*text.*
extraComments.b=false
commentsAreNotes.b=true
escapeExtendedChars.b=false
useCodeFinder.b=true
codeFinderRules.count.i=4
codeFinderRules.rule0=%(([-0+#]?)[-0+#]?)((\d\$)?)(([\d\*]*)(\.[\d\*]*)?)[dioxXucsfeEgGpn]
codeFinderRules.rule1=(\\r\\n)|\\a|\\b|\\f|\\n|\\r|\\t|\\v
codeFinderRules.rule2=\{\d.*?\}
codeFinderRules.rule3=\<(/?)\w+[^>]*?>
codeFinderRules.sample=%s, %d, {1}, \n, \r, \t, etc.
codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=true

configurations.name: Skype Language Files
configurations.description: Skype language properties files (including support for HTML codes)
configurations.parametersRaw: #v1 useLD.b=true localizeOutside.b=true useKeyCondition.b=false extractOnlyMatchingKey.b=true keyCondition=.*text.* extraComments.b=false commentsAreNotes.b=true escapeExtendedChars.b=false useCodeFinder.b=true codeFinderRules.count.i=4 codeFinderRules.rule0=%(([-0+#]?)[-0+#]?)((\d\$)?)(([\d\*]*)(\.[\d\*]*)?)[dioxXucsfeEgGpn] codeFinderRules.rule1=(\\r\\n)|\\a|\\b|\\f|\\n|\\r|\\t|\\v codeFinderRules.rule2=\{\d.*?\} codeFinderRules.rule3=\<(/?)\w+[^>]*?> codeFinderRules.sample=%s, %d, {1}, \n, \r, \t, etc.$0a$texttext$0a$Test &tl; and more. codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=true

configurations.name: Properties with complex HTML Content
configurations.description: Java Property content processed by an HTML subfilter
configurations.parametersRaw:
#v1
useLD.b=true
localizeOutside.b=true
useKeyCondition.b=false
extractOnlyMatchingKey.b=true
keyCondition=.*text.*
extraComments.b=false
commentsAreNotes.b=true
escapeExtendedChars.b=false
useCodeFinder.b=true
codeFinderRules.count.i=3
codeFinderRules.rule0=%(([-0+#]?)[-0+#]?)((\d\$)?)(([\d\*]*)(\.[\d\*]*)?)[dioxXucsfeEgGpn]
codeFinderRules.rule1=(\\r\\n)|\\a|\\b|\\f|\\n|\\r|\\t|\\v
codeFinderRules.rule2=\{\d.*?\}
codeFinderRules.sample=%s, %d, {1}, \n, \r, \t.
codeFinderRules.useAllRulesWhenTesting.b=true
subfilter=okf_html

inlineCodes.title: Inline Codes
inlineCodes.description: Pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, variables, tags) within translatable text.

extractOnlyMatchingKey.title: Extract Only Matching Keys
extractOnlyMatchingKey.description: When enabled, extract only entries whose keys match the condition; otherwise exclude matching keys.

useKeyCondition.title: Enable Key Condition
useKeyCondition.description: Filter entries for extraction based on a regex condition applied to their keys.

keyCondition.title: Key Condition Pattern
keyCondition.description: Regular expression pattern to test against property keys for extraction filtering.

localizeOutside.description: Extract translatable items that are not within the scope of a localization directive.
localizeOutside.title: Extract Outside Directives

extraComments.title: Additional Comment Markers
extraComments.description: Recognize semicolon and double-slash comment styles in addition to standard # and ! markers.

idLikeResname.title: Use Key as Text Unit ID
idLikeResname.description: Use the property key value as the text unit ID in addition to the resource name.

useLd.description: Enable recognition of localization directives in comments to override default extraction behavior.
useLd.title: Use Localization Directives

escapeExtendedChars.title: Escape Extended Characters
escapeExtendedChars.description: Escape extended Unicode characters in output.

useJavaEscapes.title: Retain Java Escapes
useJavaEscapes.description: Keep Java property escape sequences in extracted text instead of resolving them.

convertLFandTab.title: Convert \n and \t
convertLFandTab.description: Convert \n and \t escape sequences to actual line-breaks and tabs during processing.

enabled.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes (placeholders, tags, etc.)

rules.description: Regex patterns to identify inline codes in translatable text

mergeAdjacent.description: Merge consecutive inline codes into a single placeholder

moveBoundaryCodes.description: Move inline codes at segment boundaries to the skeleton (non-translatable)

simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation

codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns for inline code detection

rules.description: List of regex patterns to detect inline codes

pattern.description: Regex pattern for inline code detection

sample.description: Sample text to test patterns against

useAllRulesWhenTesting.description: Test all rules together or individually

simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation
